subject: Re: Limitless Letter
body:
for the caribbean

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

> JEE,
>  
> What do you mean "for the car" in your message:
>  
> "find jeffrey a very fast speedboat with an enclosed
> wheelhouse... for  the car   similar to the ribtec
> but
> newer... the boat will not be  sold but if you need
> something to show your employer,,," 
>  
> Do I understand correctly that you are asking me to
> ask Craig to try to  find 
> you a very fast rigid bottom inflatable speed boat
> with an enclosed  
> wheelhouse that is similar to the Ribtec you have
> but newer?  By similar,  do you mean 
> in speed and dimensions?  Please advise.
>  
> In addition, should I tell Craig that Limitless is
> not for sale and is not  
> going to be in the forseeable future, but if Craig
> needs the rep letter as part 
>  of his employment then we will accommodate Craig
> within reason?  Please  
> advise.
>  
> If this is what you are asking me to do, I will ask
> Craig to send me a  draft 
> of what he proposes for the rep letter. 
>  
> Darren
>

body_html:
for the caribbean

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

JEE,

What do you mean "for the car" in your message:

"find jeffrey a very fast speedboat with an enclosed
wheelhouse... for the car similar to the ribtec
but
newer... the boat will not be sold but if you need
something to show your employer,,,"

Do I understand correctly that you are asking me to
ask Craig to try to find
you a very fast rigid bottom inflatable speed boat
with an enclosed
wheelhouse that is similar to the Ribtec you have
but newer? By similar, do you mean
in speed and dimensions? Please advise.

In addition, should I tell Craig that Limitless is
not for sale and is not
going to be in the forseeable future, but if Craig
needs the rep letter as part
of his employment then we will accommodate Craig
within reason? Please
advise.

If this is what you are asking me to do, I will ask
Craig to send me a draft
of what he proposes for the rep letter.

Darren
